creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
> libvorbis compiles alright in its own, but when its being compiled as a 
> depend on lame.
[snip]

Hi David,

it is too late right now. this is due to the upgrade of libogg and
libvorbis to 1.0-rc2 :( I spent around 2 hours to identify this
and around 2 more hours to try to fix it w/ no luck. so, I've just
submitted a bug report to the lame team. see the following URL for
details :

https://sourceforge.net/tracker/index.php?func=detail&aid=462400&group_id=290&atid=100290

be patient. I'm sure we'll commit this PR in a few days ;^)

see you...

Cyrille.
